Added_Other.purpose: Makes it easier for players to find and select outerwear items.

Added_Other.name: FFlagEnableAmpUpsellLogging_Staged
Added_Other.mechanism: Tracks and logs upsell interactions in the AMP system.
Added_Other.purpose: Helps developers understand player engagement with upsell offers.

Changed_Other.name: DFStringFlagRepoGitHashDynamicString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Links the game's version to a dynamic string that reflects the current code state.
Changed_Other.purpose: Ensures players are using the latest features and fixes in the game.

Changed_Other.name: DFStringFlipTimeStampDynamicString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Changes how dynamic strings with timestamps are formatted.
Changed_Other.purpose: Enhances the display of time-related information for players, making it clearer and more user-friendly.

Changed_Other.name: FStringFlagRepoGitHashFastString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Optimizes string handling related to version control.
Changed_Other.purpose: Ensures that players benefit from faster updates and bug fixes by improving how game data is managed.

Changed_Other.name: FStringFlipTimeStampFastString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Improves the efficiency of handling timestamp strings.
Changed_Other.purpose: Reduces delays when displaying time-related information in games.

Added_Other.name: FFlagDisableReactSchedulingAvgMaxMsStats_Staged
Added_Other.mechanism: Disables certain performance statistics related to React scheduling.
Added_Other.purpose: Reduces unnecessary data collection, potentially improving performance.

Added_Other.name: FFlagEnableAutoLoginAfterRecovery_Staged
Added_Other.mechanism: Automatically logs users back in after account recovery.
Added_Other.purpose: Makes it easier for players to access their accounts without needing to log in again.
